programme.title: Outlaw Tech
programme.desc: A master hacker steals $400 million and eludes capture by the FBI, until the Feds realize he's one of them; millions in drugs are stolen from a super-secure warehouse; criminals run an elaborate scheme to steal a fortune worth of gas in plain sight.

programme.title: Outlaw Tech
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind breaches a bank vault and steals over $100 million in jewels; a simple invention helps thieves make off with over $5 million in gold; when over 500 luxury cars vanish, authorities uncover a high-tech hack worth $30 mil.

programme.title: Outlaw Tech
programme.desc: South American drug lords build a fleet of narco subs to carry cocaine to the US; a gambling addict masterminds a bold casino heist.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: A vital hillside highway in Pennsylvania is destroyed in just minutes after a catastrophic landslide rocks a community; engineers investigate and uncover undetected geological issues with an increased and unstable traffic load.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: A catastrophic construction disaster causes a casino parking garage to collapse with fatal consequences in Atlantic City; using the latest science, experts investigate and uncover evidence of missing reinforcements vital for structure stability.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: Catastrophe strikes as one of America's most vital freeway intersections erupts in flames and completely collapses in San Francisco; experts use the latest science to investigate how an overturned tanker truck spawned a devastating inferno.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: When an indoor hotel walkway collapses in Kansas City, Mo., it becomes the most deadly engineering disaster in U.S. history; experts investigate and uncover evidence of a catastrophic design change in the support system construction.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes in Cincinnati as a sudden bridge collapse leaves one of America's busiest highways at a complete standstill; using scientific methods, expert engineers investigate and reveal how a routine demolition unfolded so disastrously wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: A shipping catastrophe occurs when a massive container vessel runs aground and completely blocks one of the most vital trade routes on the planet; experts investigate and uncover critical wind conditions and potential navigational errors.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: When an indoor hotel walkway collapses in Kansas City, Mo., it becomes the most deadly engineering disaster in U.S. history; experts investigate and uncover evidence of a catastrophic design change in the support system construction.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: Tragedy strikes in Cincinnati as a sudden bridge collapse leaves one of America's busiest highways at a complete standstill; using scientific methods, expert engineers investigate and reveal how a routine demolition unfolded so disastrously wrong.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: A shipping catastrophe occurs when a massive container vessel runs aground and completely blocks one of the most vital trade routes on the planet; experts investigate and uncover critical wind conditions and potential navigational errors.

programme.title: Engineering Catastrophes
programme.desc: Catastrophe strikes as one of America's most vital freeway intersections erupts in flames and completely collapses in San Francisco; experts use the latest science to investigate how an overturned tanker truck spawned a devastating inferno.

programme.title: Outlaw Tech
programme.desc: A criminal mastermind breaches a bank vault and steals over $100 million in jewels; a simple invention helps thieves make off with over $5 million in gold; when over 500 luxury cars vanish, authorities uncover a high-tech hack worth $30 mil.

programme.title: Outlaw Tech
programme.desc: South American drug lords build a fleet of narco subs to carry cocaine to the US; a gambling addict masterminds a bold casino heist.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: Spaceships powered by atomic bombs; artificial rings encircle an entire star; Neil Armstrong's transmission feed cuts off when he spots strange lights on the moon; how can lightning talk to itself.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: A photograph depicts two suns in the sky over Indonesia; ghostly white swirls on the moon's surface baffle NASA scientists; an astronaut disappears during his return to Earth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: A mysterious object is orbiting Saturn, and it looks just like the Death Star; new evidence might shed new light on the mysterious death of Yuri Gagarin, the first man in space; when a cutting-edge satellite vanishes, fears of a space war escalate.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Scientists use technology to stop an asteroid apocalypse; mankind comes closer to keeping Earth safe from killer space rocks.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Mercury is a deadly world, facing attacks from the Sun, comets, and other planets; even though it's the smallest planet in the solar system, Mercury has a dangerous secret that may one day threaten life on Earth.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Underground Marvels
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels
programme.desc: A buried ancient city hidden five-stories underground can house 3,000 people in secret; experts use the latest tech to reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on Earth; experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumors of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels
programme.desc: Eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; experts excavate these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar is an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II; new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Underground Marvels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost 3,000 years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war; experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: A breathtaking stainless steel tower seems otherworldly and out of place in the remote mountain forests of Croatia; experts investigate and uncover a dark past of Nazi-led conflict and a monument to a desperate fight for survival.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: A derelict beachside resort along the Black Sea is constructed upon deception and deep connections to the criminal underworld; experts investigate and uncover dark secrets behind a sprawling holiday complex constructed by the Russian mafia.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: The haunting remains of an isolated ghost town high in the Colorado mountains suggests a once booming mining community left in devastation; experts uncover an inhospitable land of shattered dreams where fortune seekers chased the American dream.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: Long, dome-like structures camouflaged by a rural landscape conceal the remains of concrete vaults with a hidden history; experts investigate and uncover state-of-the-art bunkers built to conceal and protect a deadly nuclear secret.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: An enormous concrete box with bizarre circular openings looms on the coast of an island near mainland China; experts investigate and uncover tunnels leading to an enormous underground complex that nearly triggered a nuclear war.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned
programme.desc: A desert island adrift in the Gulf of Mexico contains a massive and marooned structure with a contagious past; experts investigate and uncover a desolate military fortress turned prison and plagued by a deadly disease.

programme.desc: A piece of the sun seems to have vanished; the Hubble spots an unidentified object traveling faster than light.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: When the Soviet Union unveils its own space shuttle, the CIA hatches a secret revenge plot; recent discoveries shed new light on the destruction of Sodom and Gomorrah; a missing nuclear weapon could threaten a NASA base in the Arctic.

programme.title: NASA's Unexplained Files
programme.desc: A mars mission captures an image of a strange structure on the planet; an intriguing sight on the dark side of the moon; a planet-eating star gives scientists a peek of Earth's bleak future.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.sub-title: Dark History of the Solar System
programme.desc: Our solar system hides a dark and violent past and new discoveries reveal that Earth and the planets were formed from the destruction of alien worlds that came before us.

programme.title: How the Universe Works
programme.desc: Spacetime is the secret structure that controls our universe, and this strange four-dimensional substance controls time, light, and energy; it will also determine how our universe will end.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: New evidence could finally explain a mysterious UFO encounter in the Bermuda Triangle, and using cutting-edge tech and the latest underwater discoveries, a team of experts investigate if aliens have visited this strange stretch of water.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
programme.desc: To find the truth behind unexplained phenomena, experts follow new clues to underwater alien anomalies that some believe have ties to the lost city of Atlantis.

programme.title: Curse of the Bermuda Triangle
